The evaluation limitations are as follows: The simulation environment may not fully replicate all real-world dynamics, such as unpredictable environmental interferences and complex user behaviors. The proposed framework is evaluated under specific network configurations (e.g., number of BSs, RIS elements), and its performance in large-scale and highly dynamic networks requires further verification. The current study focuses on single-type service scenarios, and the adaptability to mixed-service environments in practical metaverse applications remains unaddressed.
